chairman_summary: The dart_quic specification corpus PASSES Round 2 with a weighted score of 8.65 (up from 7.95). All five members now score at 8 or above — the council is satisfied. Key improvements: (1) Cross-references are now proper relative links throughout; (2) DATA_FLOW.md condensed significantly; (3) Certificate revocation specified; (4) Future extensions acknowledged. The corpus is ready for implementation. No further rounds required.
remaining_observations: TESTING_SPEC.md section headers use spec names parenthetically (cosmetic, acceptable)
Research/spec duplication remains (intentional for standalone readability)
HTTP/3 stream type diagram in HTTP3_SPEC.md references QUIC_STREAMS_SPEC.md inline — acceptable in context
